title: boehmeria nivea var. candicans
intro: Boehmeria nivea var. candicans, also known as Chinese mulberry or white paper mulberry, is a variety of the Boehmeria nivea plant, native to China and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Boehmeria nivea var. candicans include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, to support immune function and alleviate various health issues.
